What the Game's Been Missing (2005) is the second studio album by American rapper Juelz Santana. It received generally positive reviews from critics, with praise for Juelz Santana's performance and standout tracks. However, some critics noted inconsistent production quality and lackluster lyrics. The album reached the top 10 on the US Billboard 200 chart and was certified gold by the RIAA. Despite mixed reviews, the album remains well-known for its standout tracks and Juelz Santana's improvement from his previous work.
